decisions.what: Replaced opportunity section with comprehensive investment details
decisions.why: Specification required detailed joint venture opportunity section with investment tiers, returns timeline, partnership structure, and risk mitigation

decisions.what: Added three investment tier cards with different pricing ($50K, $100K, $250K+)
decisions.why: Specification requested multiple investment tiers with corresponding benefits and a featured tier badge for most popular option

decisions.what: Created returns timeline with Year 1-3 projections and disclaimer
decisions.why: Specification required expected returns timeline with disclaimers for transparency

decisions.what: Implemented partnership structure section with roles, profit sharing, and governance details
decisions.why: Specification called for partnership structure explaining roles, responsibilities, and profit sharing model

decisions.what: Added risk mitigation section with four mitigation strategies
decisions.why: Specification required risk mitigation strategies including crop insurance, diversification, market analysis, and operational reserves

decisions.what: Used CSS Grid for tier cards, timeline content, structure content, and mitigation content
decisions.why: Specification requested CSS Grid or Flexbox for tier cards layout, Grid provides better responsive behavior for card layouts

decisions.what: Applied professional business-focused styles with proper spacing and typography hierarchy
decisions.why: Specification required professional appearance with proper spacing, typography, and visual hierarchy for business context

decisions.what: Used CSS custom properties for theming throughout opportunity section styles
decisions.why: Specification required consistent use of CSS custom properties for theming to maintain design system coherence

decisions.what: Added responsive adjustments using auto-fit minmax pattern
decisions.why: Specification required responsive adjustments for mobile/tablet/desktop, auto-fit provides automatic responsive behavior

decisions.what: Implemented hover effects and transitions on cards and interactive elements
decisions.why: Following existing component patterns for consistent user experience across the landing page
